main.description: A user's avatar. One per DID. The base body is a built-in greyscale walk sprite tinted by the tint color. Wearables composite on top in array order.

baseAvatar.description: Strong reference to the base avatar record.

baseAvatarTints.description: Tints for the base avatar layers

baseAvatarTransform.description: Optional 2D affine transform applied when compositing the base avatar, stored as a fixed-point matrix (see at.cozy-corner.defs#wearableTransform).

wearables.description: Equipped wearables in composite order (first = bottom layer). Each entry references a wearable and can override tint/offset.

equippedWearable.description: A wearable equipped on an avatar, with per-equip overrides.

wearable.description: Strong reference to the wearable record.

transform.description: Optional 2D affine transform applied when compositing this wearable, stored as a fixed-point matrix (see at.cozy-corner.defs#wearableTransform).

state.description: State values for this equipped wearable, overriding stateProperty defaults.
